creator: jlduran@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 201048
Update to version 5.7.2

Thank you for testing it.

I noticed you updated the URL, thank you!

Changes: https://wiki.strongswan.org/versions/72

This revision adds a new patch that shows the right version when issuing:

    $ /usr/local/libexec/ipsec/charon --version
